label: ProxLab: Multi-Step Diagnosis
info: Demonstrates running a multi-step agent chain: first agent gathers system info, second agent analyzes it, third produces actionable recommendations.

props.v: Run a full system health check

name: Format Report

props.v: {"name":"System Diagnosis","steps":[{"agent_id":"general","message_template":"List all entity states that look abnormal or have error/unavailable status. Include device names and current values."},{"agent_id":"general","message_template":"Based on this system state report, identify the root causes of any issues and rank them by severity: {{previous_response}}"},{"agent_id":"general","message_template":"Create a concise action plan with specific steps to resolve these issues, ordered by priority: {{previous_response}}"}]}

name: Save Chain ID
Top: Run an existing chain | Bottom: One-time setup to create the chain
info:
**How to use:**
1. Configure the ProxLab server on all proxlab nodes
2. Click 'Setup: Create the chain' inject node once to create the 3-step diagnosis chain
3. Copy the chain_id from the debug output into the 'Run Diagnosis Chain' node and 'Trigger Diagnosis' inject node
4. Click 'Trigger Diagnosis' to run the full chain

name: --- One-Time Setup (create the chain, then copy chain_id above) ---
